# Dataset Curation Packet Template

Use this template when the desk must hand dataset work to another desk or implementation agent.

```yaml
workflow_mode:
current_stage: dataset-curation-desk
capability_id:
user_goal:
intended_use:
risk_tier:
approval_state:
source_facts:
evidence_links:
assumptions:
open_questions:
dataset_sources:
dataset_owner:
rights_status:
consent_status:
sensitivity_classification:
label_schema:
labeling_instructions:
sampling_strategy:
balancing_strategy:
deduplication_policy:
split_policy:
contamination_controls:
privacy_controls:
retention_policy:
drift_risks:
validation_gates:
hard_halts:
soft_gaps:
ready_to_continue:
downstream_handoff_targets:
```
